details.reasoning: Excellent implementation that meets all core requirements. CLI variant Stats(StatsArgs) with human flag is correctly defined. Command implementation in cache_stats.rs properly iterates over cache buckets and computes disk sizes using DiskUsage. Function signature pub(crate) fn cache_stats returns ExitStatus::Success correctly. Human-readable output using human_readable_bytes is implemented with proper formatting. Output includes per-bucket lines and a total line as required. Module registration (mod cache_stats, pub use) and dispatch wiring (CacheCommand::Stats match in lib.rs) are correct. Tests are comprehensive and well-structured with proper test context helpers. Minor deviation: uses CacheBucket::all() instead of CacheBucket::iter(), but this is actually a superior design choice for stats (includes Python bucket for complete cache reporting), suggesting thoughtful implementation rather than strict specification following.
